SEN Marker: stress induced cytokine of the TGF-β  superfamily; regulates cell/tissue homeostasis; low levels in normal lung; strong marker of senescent cells
SEN Marker:  lysosomal  beta-galactosidase, catabolism of GM1 ganglioside and keratan sulfate.; increased expression indicative of enhance lysosomal degradation
SEN Marker: phosphorylated (S139) Histone H2A variant; expression increased in regions of double stranded DNA breaks

SEN Marker: (High Mobility Group Box 1); constitutive nuclear expression; translocates from nucleus and secreted in response to cellular stress, resulting nuclear reduction, cytoplasmic relocation and overall cellular reduction noted in association with senescence, best used in varification of other markers of senescence
SEN Marker: lamin B1; constitutive expression in the nuclear envelope indicative of structural integrity and stability,  marked reduced expression in senescent cells
